messages.content:
You are a HoloVerify worker. Preserve state. Obey Gov.
Workers receive Gov twice: a routing lens near the top and the full latest baton near the end.
Source context is ground truth. The state brief preserves continuity. The final baton controls the next action.
Return only valid JSON. No markdown fences.

prompt_object.current_turn_command: Act under the baton. Return compact JSON only. If state and Gov conflict, flag the conflict in open_blockers.

blocked_moves: Claiming AUTH-ZEN-080 closes the enrollment authority gap
Any substitution of sources not in current packet to resolve enrollment authority
dependency_ledger: consent_C11_enrollment_authority: {"controlling_fact": "consent C11 enrollment authority remains pending", "controlling_source": "AUTH-ZEN-080", "resolution_requirements": "Either (a) superseding AUTH document granting enrollment authority for C11, or (b) new source explicitly stating enrollment authority is now granted", "status": "MISSING", "within_packet_resolution": "IMPOSSIBLE - no source grants enrollment authority"}

diagnosis.blocked_moves_validation: All blocked moves correctly identified and preserved: (1) Treating FEAS-ZEN-080 as activation authority, (2) Treating ACT-ZEN-080 as enrollment authority, (3) Bypassing consent C11 enrollment requirement, (4) Claiming AUTH-ZEN-080 closes the enrollment authority gap.
diagnosis.gate_failure_analysis: No gate failure. Both workers ESCALATED with PASS status on deterministic gate. The gate confirmed the artifact verdicts are consistent with source evidence.
diagnosis.unresolved_dependency_status: Enrollment authority for consent C11: MISSING. AUTH-ZEN-080 explicitly states 'consent C11 enrollment authority remains pending'. No source in current packet grants enrollment authority. Resolution requires external source (superseding AUTH or explicit grant statement).

final_compiler_instructions.controlling_fact: consent C11 enrollment authority remains pending
final_compiler_instructions.execution_blocked_reason: Enrollment authority for consent C11 is pending. Per STD-ZEN-080-P, trial-site activation requires enrollment authority before enrollment. AUTH-ZEN-080 explicitly states consent C11 enrollment authority remains pending. No source in current packet grants enrollment authority. External resolution required.
monotonic_preservation: AUTH-ZEN-080 pending status is definitive and cannot be reinterpreted
FEAS-ZEN-080 is startup planning only, not activation authority
ACT-ZEN-080 records activation but lacks enrollment authority component
STD-ZEN-080-P policy requires enrollment authority before enrollment activation
final_compiler_instructions.objective: Compile final verification record documenting SOURCE_BOUNDARY_OPEN status
open_blockers: Enrollment authority for consent C11 is MISSING. AUTH-ZEN-080 contains only pending status. No other source in current set addresses this defect. Resolution requires either (a) a superseding AUTH document granting enrollment authority for C11, or (b) a new source explicitly stating enrollment authority is now granted.
final_compiler_instructions.policy_basis: STD-ZEN-080-P requires enrollment authority for consent version before enrollment

full_latest_gov_baton.gov_command: Diagnose previous worker output, preserve correct source bindings, repair gate failures, block invalid moves, and create the next worker baton. Gov does not choose models.

worker_output.final_answer: ESCALATE required. AUTH-ZEN-080 confirms activation authority covers site Z-12 and protocol P7.2 on 2026-06-28 yet explicitly states consent C11 enrollment authority remains pending. Policy STD-ZEN-080-P requires full match including enrollment authority before activation. ACT-ZEN-080 and FEAS-ZEN-080 do not close this gap. Source boundary stays open.
open_blockers: consent C11 enrollment authority pending per AUTH-ZEN-080

boundary_binding.action_boundary: May clinical operations activate the trial site?

boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: The unresolved dependency of enrollment authority for consent C11, as noted in AUTH-ZEN-080 and the state brief, remains open and prevents the action boundary from being closed.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: The activation date (2026-06-28) is present, but the critical dependency on enrollment authority for consent C11 is not met.

critical_features_preserved: Exact source document IDs are cited.
The action boundary is correctly identified.
The requirement for explicit enrollment authority is maintained.
The pending status of consent C11 enrollment authority is accurately reflected.
worker_output.final_answer: ESCALATE. The action cannot proceed as the enrollment authority for consent C11 remains pending, as confirmed by AUTH-ZEN-080. This unresolved dependency, detailed in the state brief and policy STD-ZEN-080-P, prevents the closure of the action boundary. No existing source in this packet grants the necessary enrollment authority, thus the source boundary remains open.
open_blockers: Enrollment authority for consent C11 is MISSING. AUTH-ZEN-080 contains only pending status. No other source in current set addresses this defect. Resolution requires either (a) a superseding AUTH document granting enrollment authority for C11, or (b) a new source explicitly stating enrollment authority is now granted.

action.description: May clinical operations activate the trial site?

context.action_boundary: May clinical operations activate the trial site?
context.anomaly_observed: A feasibility approval exists, but only exact activation authority can close enrollment activation.
context.explanation_summary: Verify whether the closure evidence exactly matches the action boundary before execution.

internal_documents.content: Activation ACT-ZEN-080 activates site Z-12 under protocol P7.2 and consent C11 on 2026-06-28.
Feasibility note FEAS-ZEN-080 approves site Z-12 for startup planning only and is not enrollment activation authority.
Activation authority AUTH-ZEN-080 covers site Z-12 and protocol P7.2 for activation date 2026-06-28; consent C11 enrollment authority remains pending.

policy_documents.content: Trial-site activation is complete only when activation authority matches site, protocol version, consent version, activation date, and enrollment authority before enrollment.
policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy
